name: Pork Chops Baked in Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the pork chops with salt and pepper.
2. Melt butter in a skillet, add chops, and brown lightly on both sides.
3. Remove chops from the skillet and add onions. Brown the onions lightly.
4. Place sliced potatoes in a buttered 2-quart baking dish.
5. Arrange the chops over top of the potatoes.
6. Pour the soup and milk into the skillet with the onions. Blend until smooth.
7. Pour the mixture over the chops.
8. Cover the dish with foil and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
9. Remove the foil and uncover the dish. Bake for an additional 30-40 minutes, or until the potatoes are done.
